hero.name: Emrullah Bozkurt
hero.tagline: I build clean, high-performance products across web and mobile — from Node.js APIs to Flutter and React apps.

about.title: About me
about.body: I'm a Computer Engineer and solution-oriented developer. I've broadened my skill set from mobile development (Flutter/Dart) and Python instruction to full-stack web solutions (Node.js/React). I care about Clean Architecture, Agile methodologies, and sustainable, high-quality code.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or just want to say hi? Send a message.
contact.name: Name

contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.name: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.message: Message must be at least 10 characters
